propositions.statement: d_5(D) = kh_2D

propositions.source_ref: DKLLW24, Corollary 4.15 (as cited in Note/formal_notes.tex)

propositions.statement: D^8 is an invertible permanent cycle giving 64-periodicity
propositions.notes: D^8 is source-certified as the invertible (64,0) periodicity class.
propositions.source_ref: DKLLW24, Proposition 4.1 (local PDF p. 25; journal p. 19)
source_refs: DKLLW24, Proposition 4.1 (local PDF p. 25; journal p. 19)

propositions.statement: d_3(u_{2\sigma_i}) = x^2h_1u_{2\sigma_i}
propositions.notes: The draft rules out the possible d5 values using C4 restriction and the permanent Euler class; stated with 8-periodicity.
propositions.source_ref: Note/formal_notes.tex

propositions.statement: d_5(h_2Du_{2\sigma_i}) = kh_2^2Du_{2\sigma_i}
propositions.notes: Derived by restricting to C4⟨i⟩ and importing the indicated C4 differential; the draft records 16-periodicity.
propositions.source_ref: Note/formal_notes.tex

propositions.statement: d_5(2Du_{2\sigma_i}) = 2kh_2Du_{2\sigma_i}
propositions.notes: Transferred from the recorded C4 d5 on Δ₁.
propositions.source_ref: Note/formal_notes.tex

propositions.statement: d_5(xh_1u_{2\sigma_i}) = kh_1^3u_{2\sigma_i}
propositions.notes: Uses two C4 transfers and the absence of a compatible surviving target.
propositions.source_ref: Note/formal_notes.tex

propositions.statement: d_9(k^2h_1^2D^3u_{2\sigma_i}) = k^4xh_1^2D^4u_{2\sigma_i}
propositions.notes: The source is selected because the target is a C4 transfer that must die by length at most 13.  Preserve this as a reviewable draft claim.
propositions.source_ref: Note/formal_notes.tex

propositions.notes: The notes use C4 periodicity and eliminate the other target because it is already a d9 target.
propositions.source_ref: Note/formal_notes.tex

propositions.statement: 2h_2D^3u_{2\sigma_i} supports a d_{13}
propositions.notes: Keep the target under review until the source chart is imported with fixed coordinates.
propositions.source_ref: Note/formal_notes.tex

propositions.notes: The formal notes force the shorter d5 because a transported d9 target must vanish by E9.

propositions.notes: The source and target coordinates are explicitly supplied in the formal notes.

comparisons.notes: Imported C4 differential constrains the Q8 source or target by naturality.

research_brief.scope: RO(Q8)-graded HFPSS for height-2 Morava E-theory
research_brief.reduction: RO(Q8) finite atlas: all 16 (* - a sigma_i - b sigma_j), 0<=a,b<=3, are persisted; no quotient by i/j transposition is applied.
research_brief.status_policy: Statements imported from drafts remain derived or under-review unless the archive explicitly treats them as established input.

periodicity_rules.name: Q8 HFPSS D^8 horizontal translate (non-E2 pages)
periodicity_rules.scope: Integer-graded Q8 HFPSS only. Applies on E_r for r>=3; the cited chart statement does not authorize E2 copies.
exclusions: No E2 propagation: the source specifies D-periodicity on E2 and D^8-periodicity on other pages.
No automatic g=kD^3 propagation: section 6.1.2 excludes v1-local classes in low filtration.
No propagation to other workspaces without a separately scoped rule.
periodicity_rules.source_ref: DKLLW24, Proposition 4.1 (local PDF p. 25; journal p. 19): D^8 is invertible in bidegree (64,0); section 6.1.2 (local PDF p. 51; journal p. 40): non-E2 HFPSS pages are (64,0)-periodic by D^8.
